COAD AlphaFold Hotspot Structure Viewer

Structures from AlphaFold DB · Canonical human UniProt models · Hotspot residues highlighted in red
AlphaFold DB provides predicted structures for the reference proteins. The red atoms mark the wild-type residue positions where the COAD hotspot mutations occur; this is not a new AlphaFold prediction of the mutant proteins.
中文：AlphaFold DB 给的是标准未突变蛋白的预测结构。红色标出发生 COAD 热点突变的位置；这不是对突变体蛋白重新做 AlphaFold 预测。

KRAS p.G12D

AlphaFold model: AF-P01116-F1 · UniProt P01116

Highlighted residue: G12 → D · structure residue is G12

Residue pLDDT: 93.9 (very high) · model mean pLDDT: 91.50

KRAS residue 12 is a classic colorectal-cancer signaling hotspot.

KRAS p.G12V

AlphaFold model: AF-P01116-F1 · UniProt P01116

Highlighted residue: G12 → V · structure residue is G12

Residue pLDDT: 93.9 (very high) · model mean pLDDT: 91.50

This is the same KRAS structural position as G12D but a different amino-acid change.

BRAF p.V600E

AlphaFold model: AF-P15056-F1 · UniProt P15056

Highlighted residue: V600 → E · structure residue is V600

Residue pLDDT: 49.1 (very low) · model mean pLDDT: 66.38

BRAF V600E is a well-known kinase-activation hotspot.

PIK3CA p.E545K

AlphaFold model: AF-P42336-F1 · UniProt P42336

Highlighted residue: E545 → K · structure residue is E545

Residue pLDDT: 94.1 (very high) · model mean pLDDT: 92.38

PIK3CA E545K lies in the helical-domain hotspot region.
